title: Zone PID Configuration
description: Schema for `zone.pid.ph` and `zone.pid.ec` namespaces. Same structure for both; defaults differ (source: ZonePidDefaults::forType). Schema version 1.

dead_zone.description: Width of zero-correction zone around target.

close_zone.description: Boundary of close-zone. Must be > dead_zone (see allOf constraints).

far_zone.description: Boundary of far-zone. Must be > close_zone (see allOf constraints).

$comment: Cross-field constraints (close_zone > dead_zone; far_zone > close_zone) are NOT expressible in standard JSON Schema 2020-12 without the non-standard $data extension. These are enforced in the AE3 Pydantic loader (config/schema/zone_pid.py model_validator) and Laravel AutomationConfigRegistry::validateZonePidPayload(). Schema alone only checks bounds and types.
